pi_items.source: export_result.sh line 7 and verifier.py line 62 both reference this output file
task.json description line 5 explicitly states header text requirement; verifier.py line 100 checks for 'AquaTrack' in header
setup_task.sh lines 56, 72, 87, 101 create exactly these chapter titles using add_messy_para() with size=14
task.json description specifies 'at least 4 sections' (Title Page + Introduction + Installation + Operation + Troubleshooting sections); verifier.py line 75 checks if section_count >= 4
task.json description states 'Format all body text as Liberation Sans (or Arial), 11pt'; verifier.py line 134 defines valid_fonts as ['liberation sans', 'arial']
task.json description states '11pt'; verifier.py lines 168-170 check for font size between 10.5-11.5pt

privileged_info_summary: The task involves restructuring a synthetic AquaTrack User Manual DOCX file (created by python-docx in setup_task.sh). The source document contains a title page and four chapters: Introduction, Installation Guide, Operation, and Troubleshooting. The document has 8 subsections total (Product Overview, Intended Use, System Requirements, Hardware Setup, Sensor Calibration, Data Logging, Error Codes, Contacting Support). Required output formatting: minimum 4 document sections with headers configured so the title page has no header and subsequent sections contain 'AquaTrack User Manual'; chapter titles styled as Heading 1; subsections styled as Heading 2; body text formatted in Liberation Sans or Arial at 11pt.
